programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: After a disturbing car accident, a young man denies all charges of drug abuse; bizarre photos on his Facebook page tell a different story. A man regrets the generous car deal he made for a friend when she leaves town and loans it to an unlicensed driver.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A young girl is used as a pawn in the violent drama that unfolds between her grandmother and mother.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A tenant makes the terrible mistake of going up against a property manager who'll stop at nothing to collect back rent.; A woman is accused of threatening her aunt with bodily harm when a feud over furniture escalates.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A 1959 vintage doll worth $3,500 is at the heart of a case involving an antique store owner suing a woman who inherited 300 dolls. Judge Corriero points out the moral liability of a young man caught between his girlfriend, her angry mother, and payback.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is reading "The Mockingbird Murder Mystery" when Ethel reads her fortune and tells her death is near. Later she overhears a conversation between Ricky and his agent and she jumps to the wrong conclusion that he's trying to do away with her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky cuts off Lucy's allowance and charge accounts because of her careless spending, Lucy finds herself short of funds. Ethel has tickets to a radio quiz show that has a cash prize of $1,000.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy becomes interested in numerology and advises Ricky that it is a good day for him to make any deals he can. However, she soon realizes that she consulted the horoscope from yesterday's newspaper.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy opens a telegram addressed to Ricky from the War Department ordering him to appear at the Army's Fort Dix. This letter plus the drills Ricky and Fred have been practicing in the living room convince the women that their husbands have been drafted.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel wants Ricky to headline a benefit for her women's club. Lucy will only try to arrange it if she is on the bill as well. After hearing Lucy's terrible singing voice, Ethel is less than eager, but eventually agrees.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to break into show business by writing a play about a Cuban tobacco picker and entering it in her women's club play competition. Of course she wants Ricky to star in it but he refuses.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes enjoy an evening singing around the piano with the Ricardos in their apartment. When they retire for the night and Lucy and Ricky continue singing, Ethel phones them demanding quiet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky needs a ballet dancer and a burlesque comic for his club's new musical revue. Lucy wants the ballet gig and takes dance lessons from a strict instructor. Learning the disciplined art is much more difficult than she imagined.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Peggy, a teenage neighbor, breaks up with her boyfriend Arthur because she is infatuated with Ricky. Lucy tries to help the clumsy schoolboy learn how to dance in order to win back Peggy's affections. To complicate matters more, Arthur falls for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After the Mertzes have a quarrel the Ricardos try their best to get them back together. Lucy invites each of them to dinner without the other knowing. The Mertzes finally reconcile but in the process, the Ricardos squabble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy hates the mustache that Ricky grows for a potential movie role and demands that he shave it off. When he refuses, Lucy gets a fake beard and glues it on her face. To teach Ricky a lesson, she kisses her husband with the beard on when he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky forbids Lucy from gossiping, she tapes her mouth shut but reveals the latest rumor to Ethel through charades. However, it seems it's the proverbial black pot and kettle when Ricky shares with Fred a spicy tidbit about one of his band members.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A mysterious portrait of Lupin appears at a major fashion show in Milan. When it's determined that the portraits have been painted by Leonardo Da Vinci, Lupin realizes something and rushes to the church where "The Last Supper" is displayed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While shopping with his family, Nyx is shot by someone and loses consciousness. He wakes up bound, and before he is Percival, his boss from his days as MI6.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the car that the famous singer Nora Anita loved and drove for nearly half a century. Zenigata and the police are after him, but they won't make a move for fear of damaging the priceless car. Where is Lupin headed in the treasured car?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While in Italy, Lupin gets a call from someone claiming to have kidnapped Fujiko. The kidnapper blackmails Lupin into stealing a marionette once owned by Gennai Hiraga and now being kept in a mansion in Tokyo.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Declarations of theft show up throughout the city, and they all bear the message "Tonight I'm going to get you, Lupin III," with a lipstick mark underneath. The one who's been distributing the notes is Rebecca.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Da Vinci announces that he is going to unveil his latest work in San Marino. Its title is "World Harmony." After the announcement, for some reason, people all around the Italian Peninsula fall unconscious... and Lupin and the gang are no exception.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca's personality is under Da Vinci's control. In an effort to save her, Lupin delves into her mind, where he struggles with all kinds of traps set by Da Vinci. He manages to find Rebecca's memories, but Da Vinci has overwritten all her memories.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin meets Rebecca to sign divorce papers, before they could finish they are attacked by zombies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca remembers the first time she meets Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin's new target is the digital currency gained from the transactions made on this site. Lupin sneaks into a massive high-security server facility, known as the "twin towers". Lupin greets the guard to the key, a young girl and skilled hacker "Ami".

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Hunt down the greatest thief of our times, Lupin III!" The Marco Polo executives have set a trap in the form of the Lupin Game. This has people all over the world tracking down Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Shinpei Mayama, the Rat Clan, Union Mama... the all-stars of assassination, from all over the world, suddenly come after Lupin. They're players in a new game started by the executives of Marco Polo: Happy Deathday.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Fujiko smiles deviously as she points her gun at Lupin, when Zenigata arrives to save him and Ami. They get into the inspector's car which takes off, but it's soon attacked by soldiers who are trying to cash in the price on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot in the head by a drone fighter. With the death of its target, the Lupin Game is concluded. Time passes, and people forget about the game. Released from his duty of hunting Lupin, Ami now lives with Zenigata, when one day Goemon visits her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: The "Smart Safe" has come to the Greater Tokyo Bank. Lupin is goaded by Fujiko and Jigen to try and crack the technological wonder. What can he do against this peculiarly secure safe?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is hired by Gaston to retrieve a painting, and manages to do so easily enough... except the painting has a strange resemblance to a real Picasso piece, forcing Lupin to examine the truth behind why he was hired.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin visits Gaston's grave. There he meets the elderly Camille, with who he goes out for a drink when the pub's phone begins to ring. On the other end of the line is the supposedly dead Gaston.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot, and Albert gets his hands on the notebook. Lupin is saved by Jigen and Goemon and manages to survive his injuries under care. He then explains his past with Albert and how they know each other.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: After learning the shocking truth about Jose's terrifying plot, Lupin heads to Jose's headquarters with Albert, his old thieving comrade. Jigen and Goemon fight off the heaviest opposition while Lupin and Albert head into the heart of the enemy territory.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: To steal the fortune of the Drug King Pablo, the gang heads to South America with Fujiko. As Fujiko distracts the target, Lupin picks off the remains of Pablo's guards while making his way through the jungle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: In a rural town in France, full of cosplayers. Within the town celebrating a pop-cultural event is Goemon. Next to the inn, he decides to keep watch at is Chloé's Bistro. Chloé is exactly the woman Goemon was looking for Lupin's current target.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/7/52: Mickey Mantle's 6th inning home run and Billy Martin's game-saving catch help the New York Yankees win their 4th straight World Series, beating the Brooklyn Dodgers in 7 games.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/65: Sandy Koufax finishes a complete-game shutout in Game 7 of the 1965 World Series to bring home a championship. The Dodgers' 2-0 victory was capped in the top of the 4th inning when runs scored on a homer and an RBI single.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/15/70: After allowing three runs in the 1st inning, Mike Cuellar silenced the Reds over the next eight frames to pitch a complete game. The Orioles offense backed his start, scoring nine runs on 15 hits to take Game 5 and win the 1970 World Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/22/75: Tony Pérez started the Reds' comeback in Game 7, smashing a two-run home run over the Green Monster and onto Lansdowne Street. Jim Burtan scored Ken Griffey in the top of the 9th to break a 3-3 tie and give the Reds their third World Series win.

programme.title: All-Star Highlights
programme.desc: Check out highlights from the 1967 MLB All-Star Game. The AL and NL were represented by some of baseball's best, including Rod Carew, Carl Yastrzemski, Roberto Clemente, and Hank Aaron.

programme.title: Baseball Seasons
programme.desc: Two of the most unforgettable endings in Postseason history occur in 2003. The Aaron Boone Game takes center stage in the series between the Yankees and Red Sox, while fans of the Marlins and Cubs are left talking about Beckett and Bartman.

programme.title: World Series Films
programme.desc: This World Series Film showcases the 1958 matchup between the Yankees and the Braves. A rematch of the 1957 World Series, Milwaukee took a 3-1 series lead into Game 5 before the Yankees came roaring back to secure their 7th World Series title in 10 years.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/11/1977 - Paul Blair singles home Willie Randolph in the bottom of the 12th inning to give the Yankees a walk-off victory against the Dodgers in Game 1 of the 1977 World Series.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A group of showgirls washes up on a deserted island after their plane crashes. Soon they discover the island is home to a large, radioactive spider.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K 25th Anniversary
programme.desc: In part two of the complete history of MST3K, Joel and the rest of the team discuss the Satellite of Love crew.

programme.title: MST3K: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Jonah's crew watch ROBOT WARS (1993). A new SOL is introduced and a new Gizmonic tech arrives.

programme.title: MST3K: Robot Holocaust
programme.desc: After the ninth chapter of Radar Men From The Moon (1952) ends in technical difficulties, Joel and the bots must endure Robot Holocaust (1986). They pretend to be characters from the movie, but Tom Servo is the only one who is into it.

programme.title: MST3K: Robot Monster: MST3K: Robot Monster
programme.desc: The guys watch a post-apocalyptic film about aliens and robots, riff on two more installments of "Radar Men from the Moon", and try to understand surrealism.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: It's Heaven vs. Hell in this short. Plus: bread?

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A high school senior named Sue and her boyfriend want to get married right after Sue graduates. A marriage counselor discourages the young couple from entering into a hasty marriage.

programme.desc: This episode of Backlot features an interview with some MST3K crew and other experts as they look back at this quirky Rene Cardona-directed movie.

programme.title: MST3K: Santa Claus Conquers The Martians

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: Los avistamientos de ovnis en el espacio no son exclusivos de la NASA. De hecho, el programa espacial soviético también experimentó los suyos. Observa cómo el equipo analiza increíbles imágenes de la NASA de ovnis reportados y presencia alienígena.

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis
programme.desc: El análisis del video tomado de un supuesto ovni sobre Illinois sugiere que el objeto podría haber sido tan grande como de 450 metros de diámetro. El vídeo, que aparece en Cazadores de ovnis, capturó tres luces brillantes en un patrón triangular.

programme.desc: The PAW Patrol heads to the jungle to help their friend find his lost parrot; the PAW Patrol discovers a beehive in Cap'n Turbot's lighthouse.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Rubble finds an old, brass jack-in-the-box with a genie inside who grants him three wishes; Francois Turbot prepares to walk a tightrope between the top of the bridge and the lookout tower.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder investigates when jets of water start springing up all over town; the Paw Patrol helps a rancher find a spooked horse.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: When the evil robot Major Bummer tries to eliminate music from the galaxy, Princess Molly and the Guppies must restore peace, harmony and melody.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Gil wants to be a ninja, but his ninja teacher just keeps giving him random tasks to do; frustrated, Gil is about to give up when another ninja challenges him, and he realizes he's been learning ninja skills all along.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Gil and Goby bring a tadpole to school to watch him grow into a frog.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Guppies must work together to turn nectar into honey for the queen bee's tea time.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: City-slicker umbrella sellers Molly and Gil set up shop in the Amazon rainforest.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Goby and Gil go on a quest to get a geode at the top of a volcano, then try to make it back to the Rocky Valley Rock Show in time to enter the contest for best rock.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Sea Witch steals the Guppies' magical jewels so she can rule the Seven Seas; the Guppies must get their jewels back and stop her before it's too late.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig go to visit the Kangaroo family in Australia and get to explore the Outback.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa has a pen pal; Peppa and George help their grandparents clean their attic; Peppa and Suzy Sheep argue; Peppa and George's toy basket is too full; Peppa and her friends go camping.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family fly a kite; the rain makes Peppa sad; Peppa and her family go to Windy Castle; Peppa and George play hide and seek; Daddy Pig takes the family for a drive.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig loses his title as Champion Puddle Jumper; Suzy thinks that Peppa talks too much; Mr. Fox finds three clocks in the back of his van; Peppa and George go to play with their cousin Chloe; the children attend Grampy Rabbit's gym class.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George play in Grandpa Pig's garden; Grandpa Pig has a surprise; George joins Peppa's play group; Granny and Grandpa Pig organize a treasure hunt; Peppa's family goes for a drive.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: When Molly and Gil bring a comic book to school, the Guppies are inspired and they all want to be superheroes.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Molly helps a princess-in-training with her manners, and together they become princesses in the hallowed Glitter Games.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Molly performs in the quick-change dress-up match during Fashion Week in Bubbletucky and ends up on the cover of a fashion magazine.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: When Farmer Joe's baby lamb wanders off the farm during a storm, Bubble Puppy becomes a sheepdog to save the day.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: When Petunia the Dragon moves to the Kingdom of Flowers, everyone is afraid of her fearsome roar except for Zooli, who befriends Petunia and shows her friends how lovable Petunia really is.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: When Mr. Grouper's van gets stuck in the holiday snow, Mr. Claws and his horse, Snowflake, come to the rescue.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Molly, Gil and the Guppies celebrate summer with lots of outdoor fun; Gil uses his camping skills to rescue Bubble Puppy during the Summer Camp Games.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the pups must repair the aliens' spaceship and get everyone back to Earth; when a satellite begins to fall toward Adventure Bay, the PAW Patrol have to fix it before it crashes.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The pups must catch three baby pterodactyls after they hatch from fossilized eggs unearthed on an excavation dig.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol joins Alex and Mr. Porter at their campsite and teaches them how to safely build and extinguish a camp fire; while rescuing Chickaletta from the top of City Hall, the pups notice that it has been decorated for a big celebration.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When the pups and Cap'n Turbot camp out under a magical moon, they are transformed into mer-pups so they can perform an underwater rescue.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Rubble hurts his paw while trying to fix the train tracks; Ryder and the PAW Patrol must fix the bulb in the Adventure Bay lighthouse.

programme.desc: Timmy wishes he was his father's sports car; Timmy accidentally releases the Crimson Chin's arch-villain, the Anti-Chin, into our world.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes he were the most wanted kid in America; Mama Cosmo gets her son on to a Fairyworld television program.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes that nobody needs sleep; Timmy thinks his parents would be better off without him so he wishes that he wasn't their son.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy goes back in time to try to change Mr. Crocker's past so that he will be a happier person in the present.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for master kung-fu skills in order to fight a bully; Timmy travels back in time and encounters a crazed witch-hunter.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes that the entire world would be quiet; Chester and A.J. are suspicious of Timmy's sudden popularity.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy enters Cosmo and Wanda as goldfish in a contest at school; Timmy wishes his long forgotten imaginary friend to life.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for Chip Skylark's voice in order to win the lead in the school play; Timmy and Vicky are trapped in a cave after an avalanche hits Mt. Dimmsdale.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Vicky uses underhanded tactics to try to win a beauty pageant; Timmy wishes that he can read people's minds.

programme.desc: Timmy wishes that Tom Sawyer could come out of his book and help him with his book report.

programme.desc: Timmy discovers a plot to destroy the Crimson Chin's reputation; Timmy wishes for access to Vicky's diary.

programme.desc: Timmy wishes that everything he says is right; Timmy gets to be placed with the big kids.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes that his baby sitter were nice; Pixies purchase Fairy World.

programme.desc: Timmy wishes for Vicky to find the perfect boyfriend; Timmy wishes that he were the funniest person on Earth.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy's friends get tired of how he treats them; Timmy wishes that he has no feelings.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes that his parents had some new friends; Timmy wishes that he and Trixie were the only two people on Earth.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Lili está preocupada porque no es tan perfecta como podría ser, pero luego descubre que disfruta más de su verdadero yo que el que finge ser.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés se divierten en el parque de diversiones de alta tecnología con temática de Navidad diseñado por Stu Pickles para la primera Navidad de Dil. Angélica hace que Santa renuncie.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés descubren que la Navidad significa más que regalos y tradiciones, cuando se encuentran atrapados en las decoraciones navideñas de Hugo. Angélica impulsa a Santa a renunciar.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando llevan a los bebés al circo, Carlitos teme convertirse en un payaso. Cuando Angélica ve una entrega de premios en televisión, los bebés deciden hacer su propia entrega de premios.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés encuentran una galería de juegos medievales que los lleva a una fantasía para salvar a Taffy de un feroz dragón llamado Gracko. Los bebés intentan hacer más fuerte a Dil para que pueda jugar con ellos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés asisten a un juego de básquet y defienden a la mascota del equipo visitante: un bicho gigante. Angélica quiere la sala para ella sola.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Kimi es elegida para hacer una audición para una película, y le dicen que será una estrella. Los bebés creen que vivirá en el cielo. Los bebés creen que Taffy y Angélica intercambiaron identidades.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica le dice a los bebés que Carlitos es un extraterrestre del espacio y que la casa es su nave. Carlitos tiene temor de tocar cosas por miedo a tener contacto con gérmenes.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El cachorro de los Finster está triste, y los bebés creen que es porque aún no le dieron un nombre. Por otro lado, una amiga de Betty viene de visita con su hija Alice, justo cuando los reportes climáticos predicen un huracán, también llamado Alice.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo, Chas, Angélica y Susie van con sus mascotas a un concurso para disputar el premio de Mejor Mascota. Taffy lleva a los bebés a su primera visita a un restaurante de comida rápida.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés acompañan a sus mamás a la venta anual para bebés, pero ellos creen que serán vendidos. Los bebés hacen un bebé de nieve y lo llaman Steve.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy pierde la paciencia en un juego y Angélica desafía a los demás. Por otro lado, Didi lleva a los bebés a la universidad y viven una aventura en el campus.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Ángelica les dice a los bebés que sus padres quieren volver a ser niños y, por eso, llevan a sus familias a un lugar de vacaciones de la infancia. Los padres de Kimi organizan una fiesta de cumpleaños especial.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo lleva a los Rugrats a un lavadero de autos, en donde los bebés se envuelven en una batalla contra Angélica. Tommy y su guía mística Sabu, cruzan el patio de los Pickles en medio de una ola de calor, para llegar a la tierra de las aguas.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés deben ayudar a Angélica a vender en su puesto de limonada, pero ella se niega a pagarles, y Susie aconseja que hagan una huelga. Carlitos y Fili se ponen vestidos para ver cómo se siente y descubren que son más frescos que los pantalones.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés visitan una feria medieval tras ser hechizados con un cuento del Abuelo. El sentido del olfato de Carlitos mejora tras visitar al médico y hacer un tratamiento especial y ahora se siente libre.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlos decide que Carlitos debe usar el inodoro, así que él y los bebés entrenan a Firulais para que también lo use. Angélica toma crédito por el arte abstracto de los Rugrats y empieza ser considerada como una artista extraordinaria.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés confunden la niebla por nubes. Cynthia cae al agua durante un viaje en barco.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés quieren deshacerse del fantasma que creen que vive en el colchón del abuelo. Por otro lado, la minivan de Carlota deja de funcionar mientras lleva a los bebés al concierto de los Dummi Bears.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: A Tommy le da hipo, y Angélica y sus amigos se ofrecen a asustarlo para que se le quite. Llega el otoño y los Rugrats creen que los árboles están enfermos ya que ven que las hojas se caen y cambian de color. Tommy encabeza una campaña para curarlos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica quiere conseguir dulces y finge que su muñeca Cynthia fue secuestrada e incluso envía notas falsas de rescate. Los bebés intentan ayudar a una tortuga para que se encuentre con su padre.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica ordena comida de un restaurante. Los Pickles preparan una foto para su tarjeta de Navidad.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Una picada de mosquito afecta a Angélica y se le hincha la nariz. Los bebés conspiran contra un técnico de reparación.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés creen que el Abuelo se comió un insecto e intentan darle remedios. El Abuelo lleva a los Rugrats a un juego de bingo. El abuelo menciona que la Señorita Suerte no lo acompañó y los bebés piensan que se trata de una mujer.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlos se enamora de una oficial de tránsito y por algo que dice Angélica, Carlitos tiene miedo de ir preso cuando rompe los lentes de su padre. El hermano de Didi y su esposa están pensando en tener un bebé, así que deciden cuidan a los Rugrats.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos se enamora de Emma, una niña que juega sola en el parque. El único problema es que es la hermanita de un niño sobreprotector, muy grande, de tres años. Los Rugrats van a una pizzería e intentan recuperar unos boletos que Angélica ganó.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy es confundido con un bebé problemático. Una partida de póquer en casa de la tía Miriam.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony discovers the melting pot of cultures and cuisines in Melbourne.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony steps away from the tourists and into the Venice of Venetians.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony sets off on "some unfinished business" in Chicago.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony answers the top 10 viewer questions from an online poll.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony travels to the heart and soul of America's rust belt.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony finds out more about the motherland of Azorean Portuguese immigrants.

programme.desc: Tony explores the diverse cuisine and gorgeous landscapes of Chile.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The show continues with more past guests returning to add to the mayhem!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: They say you never forget your first time well these guests are here to live out their unforgettable first-time fantasies.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Whoever made the saying "you can't have your cake and eat it too" must have been going to the wrong bakery. Our guests are here to get what they want and aren't scared of who they have to run over to get it.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Regina tells her daughter, Angela, that she is getting married to her ex-boyfriend! Next Suzanne is tired of her boyfriend complaining about her job as an exotic entertainer. Then Tanya is here to tell Bryan's wife about their affair.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Is it love, or fiction? 20-year-old Nick is desperate to get the love of his life back after one magical night of passion. Steve's not sure who's telling the truth, but the lie detector will yield the final results.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kayla's madly in love with Levi, her baby's father, whom she's been dating for years. But this relationship is far from ordinary. A few months back, Kayla's 17-year-old sister accused Levi of taking advantage of her while sleeping.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: 17-year-old Naomi has undergone a sudden attitude change and is on a mission to have a baby. Parents Leeanders and April need Steve to intervene!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: A mom, addicted to PCP, repeatedly abuses her daughter. She even forced her daughter to lie about her abusive boyfriend just so he could get out of jail.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Joshua suspects the mother of his 2 sons, Ricketta, of cheating and has paternity doubts. Ricketta denies Joshua's suspicions and is ready to prove it! Then, is Michael Leanna's child's father? Is Corey Jonetta's baby's father or not

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: During the season Steve met teen girls with issues ranging from pregnancy to gangs. He's tried to help these young women get their lives on the right path. Now, Steve's hosting his very own teen girl town hall. No question is off-limits!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: After 26 years of uncertainty, Kera's mother, Crystal, believes Wayne is her father. Wayne and his wife, Peggy, deny it, accusing Crystal of stirring up trouble. A DNA test will reveal the truth about Kera's missing father at last.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Latoya is worried that her sister Tenielle's boyfriend Ashley is too close to Tenielle's daughter! Latoya and the child's father Antonio are here because they demand Ashley prove his innocence with a lie detector test!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Mommy Hurt Me
programme.desc: Three years later, Elizabeth still carries strong doubts about Manny's intentions with her family and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is Manny innocent?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kiki y su hermana Sad-e aseguran que el novio de Kiki, Tavon, es un infiel. ¿Qué dirán cuando aparezca en nuestra cámara oculta? Entonces, ¿los hijos de James y Nikkie son realmente suyos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿La esposa del pastor Terry lo engañó con 200 hombres diferentes? A continuación, Naomi quiere averiguar si su prometido, Jesse, es un infiel. ¿Qué revelarán los resultados en Maury hoy?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maurio dice que no es padre de 5 hijos. Cuando se revelen los cinco análisis, ¿se demostrará que tiene razón o será un perdedor? ¡La familia de Jon dice que él no es el padre del bebé de Courtney! ¿Los resultados de la prueba dirán lo contrario?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Toni y Quintin regresan para averiguar quién es el padre de su hijo. ¡Esta vez se preguntarán si Toni fue infiel! ¡Jenny tiene que saber si su hijo es de su esposo o de su amiga! Finalmente, ¿Vivian pondrá fin a la búsqueda de su hijo de 30 años?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: El propio hermano de Terrazina, Tyson, cree que Simon no es el padre. ¿Probará Tyson que ella fue infiel y que Simon no es el padre de su hija? Después, William tendrá un acalorado debate con dos mujeres sobre la paternidad de sus hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Michael dice que él y Britny no tuvieron relaciones sexuales lo suficiente como para que ella quedara embarazada. Shekeita y su hermana Natasha están aquí para demostrar que Kieary es el verdadero padre del bebé de Shekeita.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rachelle cree que su novio, Chris, puede estar siendo infiel con unas 50 mujeres, ¡incluyendo a su hermana! Entonces, Carrie se sorprendió al descubrir que su novio, Chris, mintió sobre su servicio militar.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kyle niega ser el padre del hijo de Citasia. Su mamá dice que él miente. Entonces, Josh tuvo cinco hijos. Dana dice que más vale que se prepare para el sexto porque ella dice que es el padre de su bebé.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury dice: "¡Tú SÍ eres el padre!" ¿Pero son esas las palabras que los presuntos padres nerviosos quieren oír? ¿O "Tú NO eres el padre" pondrá a las madres en shock? ¡Averigua los resultados en el MAURY de hoy!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En esta edición especial de The Maury Show, Maury invita a celebridades al escenario para compartir algunas de las imágenes reales más intensas e impactantes jamás grabadas.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Después de meses de rogar y suplicar, Latoya perdonó a Justice por su infidelidad. ¡Pero ahora han vuelto para someterlo a juicio por lo mismo! Después, puede que James sea demasiado bueno para ser verdad…

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Infieles, infieles y más infieles! El episodio de hoy de MAURY está lleno de drama, asombro y tentación. ¡Estos invitados simplemente no saben controlar sus acciones ante una tentación y se encuentran en un grave problema con sus parejas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Waldo se niega a ser el padre del bebé de Chelsea por su piel clara. Después, Kianna encontró fotos de mujeres desnudas en el teléfono de Nick y condones y colonia en su bolso de gimnasio. ¿Qué dirán los resultados del detector de mentiras de Maury?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Es Cortney el padre de los hijos de Brittany? Según su hermana, Brittany fue infiel con su prometido Clifton. Después, Melissa afirma que su ex-marido no es el padre de sus gemelos y que es Sean! ¿Lo confirmarán los resultados del ADN?

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Gabriel le revela a Luis Mario la realidad de sus sospechas sobre el hijo de Eva. Marybella trata de quitar de su camino todos los obstáculos que la separan de Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Como le dijo la quiromántica a Rosaura, del cielo baja en paracaídas el hombre que la va a rescatar. Iván le cuenta a Imanol que con la ayuda de Adriana ya puede ponerse en pie y no caerse.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario trata de seducir a Rosaura pero ella no se deja. Aparece Camelia y les dice que esa escena la va a conocer Patricio. Marybella está furiosa porque Luis Mario está con Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Marybella visita a Luis Mario en su trabajo. Él le recuerda lo que le dijo en la noche. Silvano le lleva a Rosaura la prensa, donde aparecen las fotos del escándalo de la fiesta.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario quiere conocer a su hermano. Guillermo no puede tomarle fotos a Luisana por su vestido. Marybella está feliz porque ella será la única a quien le tomarán fotos.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario llama a Rosaura para reclamarle lo del beso de Silvano. Ella no lo niega y le cuelga el teléfono. Luisana le dice a Bruno que ella no es Sirena pero él no le cree.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva está esperando a Marybella y la toma por un brazo. Silvano trata de seducir a Rosaura pero ella no se deja y ya se quiere ir. Eva trata de intimidar y asustar a Marybella pero ella no se deja.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario trata de sacarle la verdad a Eva pero ella no se deja Rosaura le cuenta a Claudia la cena que tuvo con Silvano. Por el escándalo llegan Silvia y Maximiliano.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: María Julia se queja de la suerte de Karina, despues Rosaura y Silvano la calman. Luis Mario le cuenta toda su historia a Maribella. Ella le da su apoyo. Panchita recibe una llamada de Patricio.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio le pide a Rosaura que sea de a él por una sola noche para que le devuelva todo. Luis Mario le exige a Eva que le diga donde está el niño para hacerle la prueba. Carlos amenaza a Bruno.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura acepta la proposición de Patricio. Maribella se está haciendo una sesión de fotos. Maribella le dice a la ayudante que está enamorada de Luis Mario y que va a tener que hacer una trampa.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio quiere tener relaciones con Rosaura pero ella comienza a llorar y entonces él le dice que se vaya, que no puede hacerlo así. En ese momento comienza a llamar por la puerta Silvano.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva le cuenta a Eduarda y a Valeria que no necesita a su hijo porque es un fastidio. Cuando llama Luis Mario para decirle que se va a divorciar, Eva se pone como loca, pidiéndole que no la deje.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Silvano y Rosaura se despiden con un beso mientras bailan felices. Maribella le confiesa a Gabriel que sus tiempos de modelo famosa ya están pasando junto con sus años.

programme.desc: A desperate cry for help leads the Straw Hats to Punk Hazard, an island engulfed in flames and inhabited by a mythic beast that could make short work of Luffy and the gang!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: Dance Moms

programme.title: Dance Moms

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: After auditioning hundreds of dancers, and facing pressure from Kira, Abby decides whether or not to make her daughter an official member of the Abby Lee Dance Company.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: With her mother's health declining, Abby leaves the girls and moms to fend for themselves at this week's competition.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason solves the murder of a beautiful blackmailer.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason proves a young Sicilian innocent of the murder of a domineering Italian patriarch.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason solves the murder of an eccentric amateur anthropologist thought to have been killed by a gorilla.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A young woman finds a fortune teller's predictions coming true -- until she is arrested for murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A race car driver, who thinks his business partner is cheating him, finds himself accused of his partner's murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason defends the owner of a booming diet candy business charged with killing a gambler who held the formula for her product.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are picking their way through Florida when they get a lead on a potential gold mine -- a five-acre property that's an automotive graveyard.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys head to the Lone Star State, hoping to uncover a Texas-size honey hole. Once there, Mike and Frank dig through a huge outbuilding filled with dead coin-operated games.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Thousands of miles from home, the guys are scouring the back roads of Texas desperate to find the big-ticket item that will make the long trip worthwhile. Just like his late father, Aardean is a funeral director who never throws anything away.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Dog Duty
programme.desc: Jimmie challenges the team to get to work on time, and the last one to arrive has to take care of all four of the shop dogs for an entire day.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Yankee Magic
programme.desc: Country singer Tracy Lawrence stops by the shop looking to sell his 1920s Martin guitar and a colorful 1960s suit from singer-songwriter Hank Snow.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: The King and His Crown
programme.desc: The guys get all shook up when a seller drops in with a real-life piece of Elvis, and Jimmie sets his sights on a 1966 Cadillac Fleetwood limousine.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Oh Say Can You Pawn?
programme.desc: A promissory note signed by Francis Scott Key has the shop feeling patriotic. Then, Jimmie checks out a very rare zebra-donkey hybrid called a "zedonk.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick considers buying an 18th Century cannon that could be worth up to $40,000.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: An 1861 Civil War saber finds its way into the shop--but if it's real, why was the blade never sharpened? Then Rick and the owner of a Chuck Berry autographed Fender guitar find themselves on different pages.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Corey gets into deep water with his dad and "The Old Man" when he buys a 1984 Chris Craft boat without first testing it out. Will he bounce back and make a profit or see his investment sink?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: It's clear that this is no ordinary pawn shop as the Pawn Stars wheel and deal items ranging from an old school Pac-Man to a Medieval Jousting Helmet.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Looking for picks in Texas, the guys see a sign for Gilley's Club, the honky-tonk club made famous in the 1980 film Urban Cowboy. Soon they're face to face with country music superstar Mickey Gilley himself.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys head to Michigan hoping to strike automotive gold in the heart of America's car capital. Clearing the contents of derelict storage lockers, Brian's sprawling auction house is a picker's playground.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Driving through Michigan in a freak spring snowstorm, the prospects look bleak until the guys spot an interesting old Cadillac for sale. With their picking senses twitching, they stop to see what else is on the property.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Determined to uncover a hidden honey hole, the guys are freestyling on their home turf in Iowa.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick buys an old, Mafia favorite the 1962 Lincoln Continental with "suicide doors," but as the repair bills add up, so does the tension between him and the old man. Then, a guy brings in a billfold from 1857 that he found while cleaning out his garage.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Old Man hopes to hit a home run when a baseball autographed by the 1951 World Series Champion New York Yankees comes into the shop, but he'll need to verify its authenticity before he steps up to the plate.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A young man wants to trade a 1750 Blunderbuss gun for an engagement ring. Will Rick exchange vows and buy the gun, or will he get cold feet and run?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick tries to refurbish a 1950's coke machine into a modernized collector's item. Will his plan quench his thirst or fizzle out and go flat? Meanwhile, Corey is offered an old pirate favorite: an 18th Century flintlock pistol.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars look to buy a 1929 Chopped Ford Coupe but if they can't agree on a price, will the deal end up rusting in the bone yard? Then, a cowboy wants to sell his mechanical calf-roping machine.

programme.title: The Spy Who Loved Me
programme.desc: Roger Moore as agent 007 teams with a beautiful Soviet agent (Barbara Bach) to battle Stromberg (Curt Jurgens) in order to save the world from total annihilation and a 315-pound villian, "Jaws" (Richard Kiel).

programme.title: Moonraker
programme.desc: Roger Moore, in his fourth role as Agent 007, is sent to outer space to protect Britain and the world from a madman who would destroy the earth in this pulse-pounding, out-of-this-universe adventure.

programme.title: For Your Eyes Only
programme.desc: Roger Moore as the formidable James Bond takes on the dangerous task of locating a top secret device that lies precariously in the waters off the beautiful Greek coast in this breathtaking action thriller.

programme.title: Octopussy
programme.desc: Roger Moore as James Bond is lured to the Indian palace of Octopussy (Maud Adams) where he learns of a plot by a diabolical villain (Louis Jourdan) that could destroy the world.

programme.title: A View to a Kill
programme.desc: Roger Moore is the enigmatic 007 in this stunt-laden adventure that pits Bond against a twisted German industrialist (Christopher Walken) and his sexy partner-in-crime (Grace Jones).

programme.title: The Living Daylights
programme.desc: This thrilling, lightning-paced adventure has the indestructible James Bond (Timothy Dalton), armed with his razor-sharp instincts and license to kill, battling diabolical arms merchants and chasing the gorgeous Maryam d'Abo.

programme.title: Su nombre es peligro
programme.desc: Equipado con agudos instintos y una licencia para matar, James Bond enfrenta a mercaderes de armas diabólicos decididos a dominar el mundo en esta emocionante y tumultuosa aventura.

programme.title: Licencia para matar
programme.desc: James Bond se lanza en su aventura más apasionada -- no por su país, no por la justicia, sino por venganza personal. Timothy Dalton aporta urgencia, encanto y determinación mortal en su papel como el agente 007.

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: Basada en la primera novela de 007 de Ian Fleming, James Bond (Daniel Craig) debe evitar que un peligroso espía ruso gane un juego de póker que vale millones y financia a terroristas globales.

programme.title: 007 Quantum
programme.desc: En una búsqueda incansable de justicia que atraviesa el mundo, Bond (Daniel Craig) descubre una compleja conspiración de la misteriosa organización Quantum para tomar el control de uno de los recursos naturales más importantes del planeta.

programme.title: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, a secret agent, is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins after him. He races against the clock in order to discover the truth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: The world's greatest spy, Ethan Hunt, returns and partners up with the beautiful Nyah Hall to stop renegade agent Sean Ambrose from releasing a new kind of terror on an unsuspecting world.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt hurdles into spectacular new adventures from Rome to Shanghai as he races to rescue a captured agent and stop Davian from eliminating his next target, Ethan’s wife.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt and his elite team go underground after a bombing implicates them as terrorists. While trying to clear their name, the team uncovers a plot to start a nuclear war.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, a secret agent, is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins after him. He races against the clock in order to discover the truth.

programme.title: Nomads of the Serengeti
programme.desc: Wildlife Expert and Safari guide Jean Du Plessis explores the Ngorogoro’s highlands and caldera on the edge of the Serengeti. The caldera is a wildlife haven that some have called a modern day Eden because of the density and diversity of its wildlife.

programme.title: The Malaysian Snake Guardian
programme.desc: Not only snakes but the utmost wild creatures and exuberant jungle share life and planet earth.

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: Give me this, I will give you that". This universal definition of trade finds an equivalent in nature in a phenomenon called "mutualism". Shaped by evolution, it describes all long or short-term exchanges and cooperation between animals to survive.

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: After centuries of being hunted to near-extinction, the regal mute swan is now flourishing, thanks to protection from the Queen of England herself. Hear the success stories of species who are working to rebuild their empires and rule once more.

programme.title: Secret Nature
programme.desc: Amphibians like frogs and toads live on the boundary between water and land, and by finding ways to exploit both worlds, they have managed to conquer an astonishing diversity of environments.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Southwest China: China's Secret Garden
programme.desc: Tucked away in China's southwest corner is a hidden oasis unlike any other. Snow-capped mountains, temperate valleys and tropical jungles are home to a spectacular array of wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: As an animal filmmaker, one often deals with lots of strange old birds. No wonder, that so much can go wrong.

programme.title: Snake Boss
programme.desc: Julia confronts her fear of heights while trying to wrangle a massive carpet python. Meanwhile, Johnny Must try to catch two of them. Later Julia has a close call with the worlds second deadliest snake.

programme.title: Big Cat Track
programme.desc: Professional tracker Ian `Max' Maxwell leads us on a breathtaking journey to the undiscovered lairs of the UK's mysterious exotic large cats.

programme.title: Wild Ones
programme.desc: The worlds most famous master of disguise, the resplendent chameleon is more than just an ever changing face.

programme.title: Wild Menu
programme.desc: At some latitudes, before winter arrives, it seems that nature is in a kind of nutritional frenzy as plants, trees and shrubs show their best fruits.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Cyril travels to one the most remote and dangerous environments in the world on the hunt for the largest freshwater fish in Africa, the Nile Perch, a massive beast with a cavernous mouth that can swallow big prey whole.

programme.title: Land of Gremlins
programme.desc: This is the story of a day in the life of an Indris Family in the rainforest of Mantadia National Park in Madagascar. On their daily path we meet other forest creatures, including some of their key predators, the boa and the fosa.

programme.title: Wild Connection
programme.desc: From the placid wood grouse to large herbivores like the chamois and the Spanish ibex to dynamic predators like bears and wolves, this program chronicles life in the animal world of this lush and varied region.

programme.title: Epic Animal Encounters
programme.desc: A couple of tourists gets mugged by baboons.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy hunts for a spring black bear in the Rocky Mountains with his Hawken rifle. Learn some skinning techniques and uses of black bear meat, fur, and fat.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy hunts the Montana mountains for what is considered to be the toughest whitetail to stalk. Mountain whitetail provides any hunter, especially one that hunts the Mountain Man way, a tremendous challenge.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote discovers a deadly funnel web spider and takes it in for venom extraction.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote is stung by the infamous 'cow killer' — the velvet ant!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote catches a lizard so big he has to ask himself, 'Did I just catch a dinosaur?!'

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote meets Wanda the Wombat! Dare he wake her with a few carrots for breakfast?

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A man working in his garden in Texas is bitten by a rattlesnake.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A woman is attacked by an elephant during a family trip to Thailand.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Jimmy rallies the crew to handle calls along the Mississippi Gulf Coast.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Tre gets sidetracked on a mission to find a legendary swamp creature.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul hustles so the Gator Boys can return to Everglades Holiday Park.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: An Australian man keeps two 10-foot saltwater crocs in a shed in his backyard. Aussie Vicky Lowing shares her suburban home with three pet crocodiles, one of whom she takes for drives in the car, another that lives in the bath.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: One man moves his family to a trailer where they share their space with more than 200 snakes. Another man continues to milk deadly snakes on a daily basis, despite developing a life-threatening allergy to venom.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Siberia
programme.desc: Bear Grylls parachutes into the Siberian tundra, one of the coldest and harshest places on earth, where he must survive extreme challenges. Battling temperatures of minus 30 degrees, he must find shelter and food before night falls.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Zambia
programme.desc: Bear Grylls ventures into the landlocked country of Zambia in Southern Africa. Before heading into the bush, he shows you how to survive some of the world's biggest rapids.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Namibia
programme.desc: Bear Grylls shows you how to survive in one of the hottest, emptiest and driest places on earth: Namibia. Bear eventually meets up with the masters of desert survival, the San Bushmen, who reveal their secrets for survival.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Land of Ice
programme.desc: Bear is airlifted into the treacherous Sanyan mountains in Siberia. Bear meets the Tuvans, yak herders descended from Genghis Khan who have lived there for 20,000 years, and learns some survival techniques from these cold climate experts.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team wonders what's up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lou's big secret. Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold-digging RO out on a date, but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou has retired, making Sonia the new boss, but will she be able to keep the company going without her big brother? Matt and Ronnie try to take a car away from a yuppie with an unusual taste for red meat.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia pushes the company to repossess more than just cars, and the backlash from the team threatens to end her time in charge before it's even begun. Ronnie and Matt attempt to repo from a reckless motocross daredevil.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia, the new boss, is still struggling to keep the team in line, but when tragedy strikes on a routine repossession, her reign at the top faces its biggest challenge yet. Matt and Froy hit the club to take a sports car away from a deadbeat DJ.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.desc: Matt is eager to work his way onto Sonia's coveted airplane repo, despite her adamancy against him.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: In the premiere of the final season of Operation Repo, the team must recover an airplane and return one hundred thousand dollars. But two members of the team bail when it's time to save the company.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.desc: Paula confiesa su amor a Juan, pero él le pide renunciar al dinero y a Esteban, como una prueba de lealtad. Ella no puede cumplirle, decide empacar y marcharse lejos. Julieta recibe el terrible diagnóstico y lo mantiene en secreto.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar termina por ceder a los sueños de Lupe dándole una tregua, todo por un reclamo de Beatriz. Juan se arrepiente de enamorarse de Paula, mientras que a ella la invade la tristeza. A Julieta no le queda mucho tiempo. Esteban aumenta su ambición.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula le ruega a Juan que vuelva con Julieta, porque a su lado sólo sufrirá en medio de sus confusiones y compromisos. Él, furioso, busca a Julieta y le pide que se reconcilien y, aunque ella duda sobre la decisión, finalmente lo hacen oficial.

programme.desc: Antonia niega que Alejandro sea hijo de Aníbal Villegas. David escucha toda la conversación. Verónica le dice a Julio que tiene pruebas contra él. Alejandro le reclama a Antonia el haber acabado con su vida; para él es la peor madre que pudo tener.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le regresa el niño a Lucecita. Alejandro va a la tumba de Gabriela y Verónica lo escucha decir cuánto todavía la extraña y la ama. Ella siente nostalgia. Antonia está tensa y ordena la muerte de Julio, que ya sabe que Gabriela está viva.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Julio repite el nombre de Gabriela Suárez mientras agoniza, pero no alcanza a decir que ella es Verónica Dantés. Antonia se va quedando cada vez más sola y Poncia se lo hace notar. Alejandro sabe que su mamá no siente nada por la muerte de Montemar.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica no quiere que Alejandro se vaya del pueblo. Él aprovecha la oportunidad para repetirle que la ama. En una misión especial a San Pedro, el comisionado Balmaceda tiene su primer enfrentamiento con Antonia. Ricardo trata su problema de impotencia.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando encuentra a su esposa con las maletas listas, él le deja el camino libre, Gabriela prefiere que se vaya su hija y no Fernando. Juan se angustia porque no conoce la decisión de Norma.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.
